protocol.name: RIFT-96 frozen pre-2024 selection evaluation
protocol.entry: next 5m open after setup plus completed confirmation
protocol.exit: scheduled open 96 completed 5m bars after entry
protocol.strict_mdd: held path, favorable extreme first then adverse; exit-bar high/low excluded
protocol.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash

failures: train: non-positive absolute return
train: CAGR/strict-MDD below 3
train: strict MDD above 15%
train: weekly-cluster p-value not below 0.10
train: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
select2023: non-positive absolute return
select2023: CAGR/strict-MDD below 3
select2023: weekly-cluster p-value not below 0.10
select2023: mean gross underlying move not above 12 bp
select2023_h1: non-positive absolute return
select2023_h2: non-positive absolute return
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat direction_flip
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat same_bar_static
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_path_quality
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat no_derivatives_crowd
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat centroid_free_momentum
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat spot_only
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat stale_setup_1h
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat stale_setup_24h
primary: minimum train/select ratio does not beat simple_two_bar_momentum

selection.reason: RIFT-96 failed at least one frozen pre-2024 gate
